description: An architectural rendering of a large white triumphal arch topped by gold winged statues and flanking eagle figures, seen from across a plaza with small figures of people and vehicles at its base for scale. An inscribed frieze reads 'ONE NATION UNDER GOD'. A title block along the bottom reads 'TRIUMPHAL ARCH - WASHINGTON, DC' and 'RENDERING', dated April 16, 2026, with a 'HARRISON DESIGN' label.
notable_text: ONE NATION UNDER GOD; TRIUMPHAL ARCH WASHINGTON, DC; RENDERING; HARRISON DESIGN
